name: EMCC.Library
description: EMCC Library — wraps the Codex protocol (Librarian agent + wiki scaffolding-and-sync tooling for consuming projects). v1.1 ships the canonical portfolio folder layout per tasks/plans/portfolio-folder-structure-spec.md.

librarian.instantiation: always-on (the agent that ingests, routes, validates inside a consuming-project's wiki)

auditor.instantiation: on-demand (Regime B; Library inherits DFDU's Auditor verbatim — same 116-line persona)

consumes: spade0704/EMCC.DFDU (when Library runs Lattice 3.0 sessions for its own development)
produces_for: consuming projects via bootstrap.py — scaffolds canonical portfolio frame (0-Inbox/ + Biz.Automation/wikisys.<name>/ + wiki.<name>/{git,local}/ + tasks/ + assets/ + root stubs) in those projects per spec (c)
consumed_by: spade0704/EMCC (orchestrator metadata + consumer-project template; status was flipped not-ready → ready in Session 1 B7 cross-repo commit)
codex_version_at_v1_1: v1.1 (Session 2 / S002 close 2026-05-27; canonical layout per portfolio-folder-structure-spec section c)
